name: Mexican Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons red bell pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked chicken, sour cream, mayonnaise, carrot, cilantro, capers, red bell pepper, lemon juice, ground cumin, and onion.
2. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Add the tabasco sauce and mix again.
4. Arrange lettuce leaves on a serving platter or individual plates.
5. Cut the avocado into wedges.
6. Place the chicken salad mixture over the lettuce leaves.
7. Top with the avocado wedges.
8. Sprinkle with paprika before serving.
